known_limitations: Minimal reproducer of Rari Fuse read-only reentrancy via Compound-fork pool
Citation: https://rekt.news/rari-rekt/ -- Rari Fuse pools lose ~$80M to reentrancy exploit (May 2022)
Vulnerable pattern: cToken exchange rate read AFTER ERC20 transfer callback -- stale during reentrancy
Critical action gated by state: collateral valuation based on stale exchange rate
